message:
test: verify sub-agent transcript persistence and parent linkage

Tests the full spawn_agent/wait/close_agent lifecycle with StateDir enabled,
verifying that both parent and sub-agent transcript files persist after
closeAgent() and the sub-agent header has correct parent_session_id, task,
and depth fields linking back to the actual parent session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
